'''larovo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:headcap|headcap]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-r-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:headcap|headcap]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| larovo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:læreveth|læreveth]] || [[word:lærevej|lærevej]] || [[word:lærevesh|lærevesh]] || [[word:læreve|læreve]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:larorovoth|larorovoth]] || [[word:larorovoj|larorovoj]] || [[word:larorovosh|larorovosh]] || [[word:larorovo|larorovo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:larovoth|larovoth]] || [[word:larovoj|larovoj]] || [[word:larovosh|larovosh]] || [[word:larovo|larovo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:larofvoth|larofvoth]] || [[word:larofvoj|larofvoj]] || [[word:larofvosh|larofvosh]] || [[word:larofvof|larofvof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:larovotho|larovotho]] || [[word:larovojo|larovojo]] || [[word:larovosho|larovosho]] || [[word:larovoko|larovoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:larovoth|larovoth]] || [[word:larovoj|larovoj]] || [[word:larovosh|larovosh]] || [[word:larovo|larovo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:larovothol|larovothol]] || [[word:larovojol|larovojol]] || [[word:larovoshol|larovoshol]] || [[word:larovokol|larovokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:larovothotho|larovothotho]] || [[word:larovojojo|larovojojo]] || [[word:larovoshosho|larovoshosho]] || [[word:larovoko|larovoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:larovothon|larovothon]] || [[word:larovojon|larovojon]] || [[word:larovoshon|larovoshon]] || [[word:larovokon|larovokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:larovothoro|larovothoro]] || [[word:larovojoro|larovojoro]] || [[word:larovoshoro|larovoshoro]] || [[word:larovokoro|larovokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|806ef69}}
